creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Le sam 13 aoû 11 à  2:06:22 +0200, Beech Rintoul <beech@freebsd.org>
 écrivait :
> Thierry,

Hello Beech,

> Do you want me to commit this in, or do you want to take it?

I'm ATM in Ivory Coast, and it's difficult for me to test and commit;
please take it!

Best regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
